exercises.instructions_en: Put the adjective in the comparative form.

item.question: This new draft is ______ (polished) than the version we sent last week.
accepted_answers: more polished
item.explanation_ar: صفة طويلة ← more + الصفة، مو -er.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the adjective in the comparative form.

item.question: The colours are ______ (bright) than our usual brand tones.
accepted_answers: brighter
item.explanation_ar: صفة قصيرة ← -er + than.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the adjective in the comparative form.

item.question: The pacing in this cut is ______ (good) than in the first one.
accepted_answers: better
item.explanation_ar: صيغة شاذّة ← good تصير better.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: Overall, this version is ______ than the last cut.
accepted_answers: clearer
item.explanation_ar: صفة قصيرة تأخذ -er ← clearer، مو more clear ولا more clearer.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct comparative form.

item.question: The colours in the video are ______ than the brand palette.
accepted_answers: brighter
item.explanation_ar: صفة قصيرة تأخذ -er قبل than، وليس more ← brighter.

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite using a comparative with 'than'.
exercises.instructions_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى مقارنة باستخدام than

item.question: Rewrite using a comparative with 'than': The new banner is eye-catching. The old one was less eye-catching.
item.correct_answer: The new banner is more eye-catching than the old one.
accepted_answers: The new banner is more eye-catching than the old one.
The new banner is more eye-catching than the old banner.
item.explanation_ar: صفة طويلة ← more eye-catching + than للمقارنة.
item.instruction_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى مقارنة باستخدام than

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite the blunt note as a gentle suggestion using 'Could we...?'.
exercises.instructions_ar: حوّلي الملاحظة الحادة إلى اقتراح لطيف باستخدام Could we...?

item.question: Rewrite as a gentle suggestion using 'Could we...?': Make the logo appear earlier.
item.correct_answer: Could we make the logo appear earlier?
accepted_answers: Could we make the logo appear earlier?
Could we make the logo appear a little earlier?
item.explanation_ar: طرح الحل كسؤال (Could we...?) يوصل النقد بلطف بدل الأمر.
item.instruction_ar: حوّلي الملاحظة الحادة إلى اقتراح لطيف باستخدام Could we...?

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'Honestly, this version is more clearer than the last cut.'
item.correct_answer: Honestly, this version is clearer than the last cut.
accepted_answers: Honestly, this version is clearer than the last cut.
item.explanation_ar: ما نجمع more مع -er ← clearer بس.

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'Right now the soundtrack is louder the voiceover, so the words get lost.'
item.correct_answer: Right now the soundtrack is louder than the voiceover, so the words get lost.
accepted_answers: Right now the soundtrack is louder than the voiceover, so the words get lost.
item.explanation_ar: المقارنة تحتاج than بعد الصفة ← louder than.

exercises.instructions_en: Put the words in the correct order.

item.question: Put the words in order: This / version / is / slightly / more / polished / than / the / last / one
item.correct_answer: This version is slightly more polished than the last one.
accepted_answers: This version is slightly more polished than the last one.
item.explanation_ar: تلطيف (slightly) + مقارنة صفة طويلة (more polished) + than.

units.topic_name_en: Present Continuous vs Present Simple + Time Expressions
units.topic_name_ar: المضارع المستمر والمضارع البسيط وتعابير الوقت

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the present continuous or the present simple.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في المضارع المستمر أو البسيط

item.question: This afternoon, the editor ______ (add) subtitles to the video.
accepted_answers: is adding
item.explanation_ar: this afternoon ← يصير الحين ← مضارع مستمر.
item.instruction_ar: ضعي الفعل في المضارع المستمر أو البسيط

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the present continuous or the present simple.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في المضارع المستمر أو البسيط

item.question: We normally ______ (test) our ads for three days before we scale.
accepted_answers: test
item.explanation_ar: normally ← عادة ثابتة ← مضارع بسيط.
item.instruction_ar: ضعي الفعل في المضارع المستمر أو البسيط

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the present continuous or the present simple.
exercises.instructions_ar: ضعي الفعل في المضارع المستمر أو البسيط

item.question: This week we ______ (move) the launch to Tuesday because of the holiday.
accepted_answers: are moving
item.explanation_ar: this week + تغيير مؤقّت ← مضارع مستمر.
item.instruction_ar: ضعي الفعل في المضارع المستمر أو البسيط

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: At the moment, the copywriters ______ the new captions.
accepted_answers: are reviewing
item.explanation_ar: at the moment ← يصير الحين ← are reviewing.

exercises.instructions_en: Choose the correct option.

item.question: We ______ a reminder two days before every deadline.
accepted_answers: always send
item.explanation_ar: عادة ثابتة ← مضارع بسيط، و«we» تأخذ send.

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite in the present continuous to show it is happening now.
exercises.instructions_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى المضارع المستمر لتدل على ما يحدث الآن

item.question: Rewrite in the present continuous (happening now): The design team finishes the banners.
item.correct_answer: The design team is finishing the banners.
accepted_answers: The design team is finishing the banners.
The design team's finishing the banners.
item.explanation_ar: الحدث يصير الحين ← is finishing.
item.instruction_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى المضارع المستمر لتدل على ما يحدث الآن

exercises.instructions_en: Rewrite in the present simple as a weekly routine, starting with 'Every week'.
exercises.instructions_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى المضارع البسيط كعادة أسبوعية تبدأ بـ Every week

item.question: Rewrite in the present simple, starting with 'Every week': We are checking the metrics on Monday.
item.correct_answer: Every week we check the metrics on Monday.
accepted_answers: Every week we check the metrics on Monday.
Every week, we check the metrics on Monday.
item.explanation_ar: every week ← روتين ثابت ← مضارع بسيط (check).
item.instruction_ar: حوّلي الجملة إلى المضارع البسيط كعادة أسبوعية تبدأ بـ Every week

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'Right now I wait for the client's approval on the final visuals.'
item.correct_answer: Right now I am waiting for the client's approval on the final visuals.
accepted_answers: Right now I am waiting for the client's approval on the final visuals.
item.explanation_ar: right now ← يصير الحين ← am waiting مو wait.

exercises.instructions_en: Find and correct the error.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'We are usually publishing on Sundays.'
accepted_answers: We usually publish on Sundays.
item.explanation_ar: usually ← عادة ثابتة ← مضارع بسيط (publish).

exercises.instructions_en: Put the words in the correct order.

item.question: Put the words in order: The / influencer / is / posting / her / first / reel / tonight
item.correct_answer: The influencer is posting her first reel tonight.
accepted_answers: The influencer is posting her first reel tonight.
item.explanation_ar: ترتيب مؤكّد قريب (tonight) ← مضارع مستمر.
